prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约2363名、1895名、5566名（含宏福校区）、2134名、1848名。2021至2022年位次前移，2023年因宏福校区单独代码出现大幅后移，2024年回归至2134名，2025年进一步前移至1848名，近两年呈持续前移趋势，2025年基准位次约1848名；该校在甘肃省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2022年均为68人，2023年69人，2024–2025年均为71人，2026年大幅扩招至101人，较2025年增加30人（增幅约42%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争压力有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京邮电大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第50名（2025年第60名、2024年第63名），排名持续上升并首次进入Top50，学校综合实力和品牌影响力进一步增强；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现重大负面舆情事件；抖音热度评价为“一般”（总排名第64位），短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现异常报考热度信号；无投档线断档记录；信息与通信工程获评A+（全国顶尖），计算机科学与技术获评A，电子科学与技术、网络空间安全、软件工程、光学工程获评A-，共6个A-及以上学科，在信息通信领域具有显著学科优势，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类专业2024年专业热度评估为“高热推荐”，计算机类持续高热，与北邮优势学科高度契合，相关专业报考热度高；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数218,700人，较2025年总人数179,817人增长约21.6%，按近年物理类占比约66.6%估算，2026年物理类考生约145,654人，较2025年121,443人增长约20%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1848名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招42%（缓解竞争）、甘肃省物理类考生增长约20%（加剧竞争）、学校软科排名升至第50名（增强吸引力）、优势学科热度高等因素，扩招与考生增长形成对冲，但扩招幅度显著大于考生增幅，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移；预测最低位次约2287名，区间1875–2699名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、网络工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 通信工程（大类招生）
- 电子信息类（元班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子科学与技术、电子信息科学与技术等）
- 人工智能（大类招生）
- 软件工程
- 自动化类（智能机器人）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 数字媒体技术
- 电子商务（数智商务实验班）
- 理科试验班（信息科学）
- 金融科技（联合学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年北邮在甘肃大幅扩招约42%，预计最低录取位次较2025年有所后移，预测位次约2287名。位次在预测区间下限（约1875名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、通信工程、元班）；位次在区间中段（约2000–2500名）的考生以二档专业为主力选择；位次在区间上限（约2700名）附近的考生可考虑三档专业保底。北邮信息与通信工程A+、计算机A等优势学科与当前高热专业方向高度契合，就业前景良好。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2363, 1895, 5566 (including Hongfu Campus), 2134, and 1848 respectively. Rankings moved forward from 2021 to 2022, significantly dropped in 2023 due to the separate code for Hongfu Campus, returned to 2134 in 2024, and further moved forward to 1848 in 2025, showing a continuous forward trend in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of about 1848 in 2025. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Gansu Province was 68 students from 2021 to 2022, 69 in 2023, 71 in 2024 and 2025, and significantly expanded to 101 in 2026, an increase of 30 students (about 42%) compared to 2025, which alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings rose to 50th in 2026 (60th in 2025, 63rd in 2024), continuously improving and entering the Top 50 for the first time, enhancing its comprehensive strength and brand influence. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years with no major negative public incidents. Its Douyin popularity rating is 'average' (64th overall), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no abnormal application heat signals. There is no record of admission cutoff line breaks. Information and Communication Engineering is rated A+ (top in the country), Computer Science and Technology is rated A, and Electronic Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Software Engineering, and Optical Engineering are rated A-, totaling six A- and above disciplines, showing significant disciplinary advantages in the information and communication field, attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of electronic information/communication majors is rated as 'highly recommended', and computer majors remain highly popular, highly aligned with BUPT's advantageous disciplines, leading to high application heat for related majors. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province in 2026 is 218,700, an increase of about 21.6% from 179,817 in 2025. Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 66.6%, the estimated number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 145,654, an increase of about 20% from 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1848, the significant 42% expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (alleviating competition), the approximately 20% increase in physics category examinees in Gansu Province (intensifying competition), the rise of BUPT's Soft Science ranking to 50th (enhancing attractiveness), and the high popularity of advantageous majors, the expansion and candidate growth offset each other, but the expansion rate is significantly larger than the candidate growth rate. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2287, with a range of 1875 to 2699.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Communication Engineering (Major Category Enrollment)
- Electronic Information Category (Yuan Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, etc.)
- Artificial Intelligence (Major Category Enrollment)
- Software Engineering
- Automation Category (Intelligent Robotics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Digital Media Technology
- E-commerce (Digital Intelligence Business Experimental Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Information Science)
- Financial Technology (Joint Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, BUPT significantly expands enrollment in Gansu by about 42%, and the minimum admission ranking is expected to move backward compared to 2025, with a predicted ranking of about 2287. Candidates with rankings below the lower bound of the prediction range (about 1875) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Category, Communication Engineering, Yuan Class); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 2000–2500) should primarily choose Tier 2 majors; candidates with rankings near the upper bound (about 2700) can consider Tier 3 majors as safety options. BUPT's A+ Information and Communication Engineering, A Computer Science, and other advantageous disciplines are highly aligned with current hot major directions, offering good employment prospects.

_translation.university_name_en: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications
